# taikun_account (Resource)

Taikun Account

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "taikun_account" "foo" {
  name                = "foo"
  email               = "email@domain.fr"
  create_organization = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) Account's email.
- `name` (String) Account's name.

### Optional

- `create_organization` (Boolean) Create an organization for this account. Defaults to `false`.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Time and date of creation.
- `groups_count` (Number) Number of groups in the account.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `is_2fa_enabled` (Boolean) Indicates whether 2FA is enabled.
- `organizations_count` (Number) Number of organizations in the account.
- `projects_count` (Number) Number of projects in the account.
- `users_count` (Number) Number of users in the account.
